heading: Step 2
body:
In the **Scheduled Maintenance Operations** modal,
click the **Defer 1 Week** button. In the
**Defer Maintenance to Next Week** confirmation modal,
confirm by clicking **Yes, defer maintenance until next week.****Atlascli:**Atlas CLI> **Note:** You can defer a single project maintenance event up to two
> times.To defer the maintenance window using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas maintenanceWindows defer [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas maintenanceWindows defer](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-maintenanceWindows-defer).**Atlasapi:**Atlas Administration APIAtlas provides the [Defer One
Maintenance Window for One Project endpoint](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-defergroupmaintenancewindow).> **Note:** You can defer a single project maintenance event up to two
> times.
